headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》热度不减
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Trends, Enola Holmes 3 Stays Hot
summary: 今日娱乐头条：《痴迷》与《无职转生》领跑热搜；《福尔摩斯小姐3》《末日地堡》紧随其后。本周新片《达顿牧场》《穿普拉达的女王2》备受期待。
summaryEn: Top entertainment news: Obsession and Mushoku Tensei lead trends; Enola Holmes 3 and Silo follow. New films this week include Dutton Ranch and The Devil Wears Prada 2.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，但《安昂传奇》等大片即将来袭。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but big films like Avatar: The Last Airbender are coming.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》跻身本周热搜，经典IP持续发力。
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 enters weekly trends, classic IPs remain strong.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引期待，漫威宇宙再添新章。
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day sets release, Marvel expands.
